summary: A Go-based infrastructure testing tool with MCP integration, Goss migration support, and pluggable multi-format reporting.
concerns: Uncommitted changes (1 modified, 1 staged) could lead to drift
Heavy reliance on internal packages limits external reuse
Monorepo detection logic mixed with core runner concerns
suggestions: Commit or stash the pending changes to maintain a clean state
Document the MCP handler API surface in docs/commands/
Consider extracting the reporter chaining into a standalone interface
